description: Implement five core graph algorithms—Breadth-First Search (BFS), Depth-First Search (DFS), Dijkstra's Shortest Path, Cycle Detection, and Connected Components—in `src/main/java/graph/GraphAlgorithms.java` within the 'graph-algorithms' project. Ensure the implementation passes all 16 JUnit tests in `GraphAlgorithmsTest.java`, which utilize Zachary's Karate Club network data. For BFS, visit lower IDs first; for DFS, push higher IDs first to ensure lower IDs are visited first. Dijkstra's algorithm must return a `ShortestPathResult` containing the path and distance. Cycle Detection should identify cycles in undirected graphs, and Connected Components must return a list of sets of node IDs.
